parameters.content:
Main Event Router

This block receives all incoming Telegram updates and routes them by event type.
- `message` — regular user text message
- `callback_query` — inline keyboard button click

parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    {{ $json.message_id }}::BIGINT AS message_id,
    '{{ String($json.callback_query_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS callback_query_id
),

message_row AS (
  SELECT
    m.id,
    m.user_id,
    m.topic_id,
    m.content,
    m.created_at,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_id,
    m.file_unique_id,
    m.file_name,
    m.mime_type,
    m.caption,
    m.telegram_file_path,
    m.file_url,
    m.latitude,
    m.longitude,
    m.location_title,
    m.location_address,
    m.maps_url,
    t.title AS topic_title
  FROM gnote.messages m
  LEFT JOIN gnote.topics t
    ON t.id = m.topic_id
   AND t.user_id = m.user_id
  JOIN input_data i
    ON i.message_id = m.id
   AND i.user_id = m.user_id
  WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT
  i.user_id,
  i.chat_id,
  i.message_id,
  i.callback_query_id,

  CASE
    WHEN mr.id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE
    ELSE FALSE
  END AS found,

  mr.id,
  mr.topic_id,
  mr.content,
  mr.created_at,
  mr.message_type,
  mr.file_id,
  mr.file_unique_id,
  mr.file_name,
  mr.mime_type,
  mr.caption,
  mr.telegram_file_path,
  mr.file_url,
  mr.latitude,
  mr.longitude,
  mr.location_title,
  mr.location_address,
  mr.maps_url,
  mr.topic_title,

  CASE
    WHEN mr.id IS NULL THEN 'not_found'
    WHEN mr.file_id IS NULL AND mr.message_type <> 'location' THEN 'no_file_id'
    ELSE 'ok'
  END AS download_status

FROM input_data i
LEFT JOIN message_row mr
  ON TRUE;

SELECT
  t.id,
  t.title,
  t.removable,
  COUNT(m.id) AS messages_count,
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
FROM gnote.topics t
LEFT JOIN gnote.messages m
  ON m.topic_id = t.id
  AND m.user_id = t.user_id
  AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE t.id = {{ $json.topic_id }}
  AND t.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  AND t.removable = TRUE
  AND LOWER(t.title) <> 'deleted_messages'
GROUP BY t.id, t.title, t.removable;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    {{ $json.message_id }}::BIGINT AS message_id,
    {{ $json.telegram_message_id }}::BIGINT AS telegram_message_id,
    '{{ String($json.callback_query_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS callback_query_id
),

updated AS (
  UPDATE gnote.messages m
  SET deleted_at = NOW()
  FROM input_data i
  WHERE m.id = i.message_id
    AND m.user_id = i.user_id
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
  RETURNING
    m.id,
    m.user_id,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_name,
    m.caption,
    m.content,
    m.created_at
),

update_ai_metadata AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  SET
    source_status = 'deleted',
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM updated u
  WHERE meta.message_id = u.id
    AND meta.user_id = u.user_id
  RETURNING meta.id
)

SELECT
  i.user_id,
  i.chat_id,
  i.message_id,
  i.telegram_message_id,
  i.callback_query_id,

  COUNT(u.id) AS deleted_count,

  COALESCE(
    MAX(u.file_name),
    MAX(u.caption),
    MAX(u.content),
    'message'
  ) AS deleted_preview,

  MAX(u.message_type) AS message_type,

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM update_ai_metadata) AS updated_metadata_count

FROM input_data i
LEFT JOIN updated u ON TRUE
GROUP BY
  i.user_id,
  i.chat_id,
  i.message_id,
  i.telegram_message_id,
  i.callback_query_id;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    {{ $json.callback_query_id ? "'" + String($json.callback_query_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}::TEXT AS callback_query_id,
    {{ $json.telegram_message_id || "NULL" }}::BIGINT AS telegram_message_id
),

pending_to_delete AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    message_uuid,
    user_id,
    created_at
  FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
),

deleted_metadata_linked AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  USING pending_to_delete p
  WHERE meta.user_id = p.user_id
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND (
      meta.pending_message_id = p.id
      OR meta.message_uuid = p.message_uuid
    )
  RETURNING meta.id
),

deleted_pending AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages pm
  USING pending_to_delete p
  WHERE pm.id = p.id
  RETURNING pm.id
),

deleted_metadata_orphans AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  WHERE meta.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND meta.pending_message_id IS NULL
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') = 'pending'
    AND meta.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
  RETURNING meta.id
),

clear_state AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.user_state
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
)

SELECT
  (SELECT user_id FROM input_data) AS user_id,
  (SELECT chat_id FROM input_data) AS chat_id,
  (SELECT callback_query_id FROM input_data) AS callback_query_id,
  (SELECT telegram_message_id FROM input_data) AS telegram_message_id,

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_pending) AS deleted_count,

  (
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_metadata_linked)
    +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted_metadata_orphans)
  ) AS deleted_metadata_count;

INSERT INTO gnote.user_state (
  user_id,
  state,
  search_query,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.message.from.id }}::BIGINT,
  'waiting_search_query',
  NULL,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  state = 'waiting_search_query',
  search_query = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING
  user_id,
  state,
  {{ $json.message.chat.id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id;

WITH moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  RETURNING
    id AS pending_id,
    message_uuid,
    user_id,
    message,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    message_uuid,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    NULL,
    moved.message_uuid,
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url,
    moved.latitude,
    moved.longitude,
    moved.location_title,
    moved.location_address,
    moved.maps_url
  FROM moved
  RETURNING id, user_id, message_uuid
),

attach_ai_metadata AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  SET
    message_id = inserted.id,
    pending_message_id = NULL,
    source_status = 'active',
    analysis_status = COALESCE(NULLIF(meta.analysis_status, ''), 'done'),
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM inserted
  WHERE meta.user_id = inserted.user_id
    AND (
      meta.message_uuid = inserted.message_uuid
      OR meta.message_id = inserted.id
    )
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') <> 'deleted'
  RETURNING meta.id
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT
    (
      SELECT COUNT(*)
      FROM gnote.messages m
      WHERE m.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
        AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
        AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM inserted i
          WHERE i.id = m.id
        )
    )
    +
    (
      SELECT COUNT(*)
      FROM inserted
    ) AS user_all_messages
)

SELECT
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  stats.saved_count,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attach_ai_metadata) AS attached_metadata_count
FROM stats;

nodes.name: move pending to messages without topic

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gnote.user_state (user_id, state, created_at)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.user_id }},
  'waiting_for_extra_keywords',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  state = 'waiting_for_extra_keywords',
  created_at = NOW();

SELECT
  {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
  {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id;

parameters.text: Send extra keywords separated by commas or spaces.  Example: invoice, taxes, Bituach Leumi, 2025

parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id ? $json.user_id : 'NULL' }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id ? $json.chat_id : ($json.user_id ? $json.user_id : 'NULL') }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    ARRAY[
      {{
        ($json.extra_keywords || [])
          .filter(k => String(k).trim() !== '')
          .map(k => "'" + String(k).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")
          .join(",") || "NULL"
      }}
    ]::TEXT[] AS extra_keywords
),

pending AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT *
  FROM gnote.pending_messages
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
),

metadata_targets AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT
    meta.id AS metadata_id,
    meta.user_id,
    meta.pending_message_id,
    meta.message_uuid
  FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  JOIN pending p
    ON p.user_id = meta.user_id
   AND (
        meta.pending_message_id = p.id
        OR meta.message_uuid = p.message_uuid
   )
  WHERE meta.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') <> 'deleted'
),

moved AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.pending_messages pm
  USING pending p
  WHERE pm.id = p.id
  RETURNING
    pm.id AS pending_id,
    pm.message_uuid,
    pm.user_id,
    pm.message,
    pm.created_at,
    pm.message_type,
    pm.file_id,
    pm.file_unique_id,
    pm.file_name,
    pm.mime_type,
    pm.caption,
    pm.telegram_file_path,
    pm.file_url,
    pm.latitude,
    pm.longitude,
    pm.location_title,
    pm.location_address,
    pm.maps_url
),

inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.messages (
    user_id,
    topic_id,
    message_uuid,
    content,
    created_at,
    message_type,
    file_id,
    file_unique_id,
    file_name,
    mime_type,
    caption,
    telegram_file_path,
    file_url,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    location_title,
    location_address,
    maps_url
  )
  SELECT
    moved.user_id,
    NULL,
    moved.message_uuid,
    moved.message,
    moved.created_at,
    COALESCE(moved.message_type, 'text'),
    moved.file_id,
    moved.file_unique_id,
    moved.file_name,
    moved.mime_type,
    moved.caption,
    moved.telegram_file_path,
    moved.file_url,
    moved.latitude,
    moved.longitude,
    moved.location_title,
    moved.location_address,
    moved.maps_url
  FROM moved
  RETURNING id, user_id, message_uuid
),

attach_and_update_metadata AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  SET
    message_id = inserted.id,
    pending_message_id = NULL,
    source_status = 'active',
    analysis_status = COALESCE(NULLIF(meta.analysis_status, ''), 'done'),

    keywords = (
      SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(DISTINCT keyword), '[]'::jsonb)
      FROM (
        SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(meta.keywords, '[]'::jsonb)) AS keyword
        UNION
        SELECT unnest((SELECT extra_keywords FROM input_data)) AS keyword
      ) s
      WHERE keyword IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(keyword) <> ''
    ),

    ai_content = CONCAT_WS(
      E'\n',
      meta.ai_content,
      CASE
        WHEN array_length((SELECT extra_keywords FROM input_data), 1) > 0
        THEN 'User keywords: ' || array_to_string((SELECT extra_keywords FROM input_data), ', ')
        ELSE NULL
      END
    ),

    updated_at = NOW()

  FROM inserted
  JOIN metadata_targets mt
    ON mt.user_id = inserted.user_id
  WHERE meta.id = mt.metadata_id
    AND meta.user_id = inserted.user_id
    AND meta.message_id IS NULL
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') <> 'deleted'
  RETURNING meta.id
),

clear_state AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.user_state
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
),

stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_count
  FROM inserted
),

real_user_counter AS (
  SELECT
    (
      SELECT COUNT(*)
      FROM gnote.messages m
      WHERE m.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
        AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
        AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM inserted i
          WHERE i.id = m.id
        )
    )
    +
    (
      SELECT COUNT(*)
      FROM inserted
    ) AS user_all_messages
)

SELECT
  (SELECT user_id FROM input_data) AS user_id,
  (SELECT chat_id FROM input_data) AS chat_id,
  stats.saved_count,
  array_to_string((SELECT extra_keywords FROM input_data), ', ') AS added_keywords,
  COALESCE((SELECT user_all_messages FROM real_user_counter), 0) AS user_all_messages,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM metadata_targets) AS metadata_targets_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attach_and_update_metadata) AS attached_metadata_count
FROM stats;

nodes.name: send save with extra keywords result

parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    {{ $json.message_id }}::BIGINT AS message_id,
    {{ $json.telegram_message_id }}::BIGINT AS telegram_message_id,
    '{{ String($json.callback_query_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS callback_query_id
),

message_data AS (
  SELECT
    m.id AS message_id,
    m.user_id,
    m.message_uuid,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_name,
    m.caption,
    m.content,
    m.created_at
  FROM gnote.messages m
  WHERE m.id = (SELECT message_id FROM input_data)
    AND m.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
  LIMIT 1
),

metadata_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    meta.*,
    CASE
      WHEN meta.message_id = m.message_id THEN 1
      WHEN meta.message_uuid = m.message_uuid THEN 2
      ELSE 9
    END AS match_rank
  FROM message_data m
  JOIN gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
    ON meta.user_id = m.user_id
   AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, '') <> 'deleted'
   AND (
        meta.message_id = m.message_id
        OR meta.message_uuid = m.message_uuid
   )
),

best_metadata AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM metadata_candidates
  ORDER BY
    match_rank ASC,
    updated_at DESC NULLS LAST,
    id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT
  i.user_id,
  i.chat_id,
  i.message_id,
  i.telegram_message_id,
  i.callback_query_id,

  m.message_type,
  m.file_name,
  m.caption,
  m.content,
  m.created_at,

  b.summary AS ai_summary,
  b.category AS ai_category,
  b.language AS ai_language,
  b.keywords AS ai_keywords,
  b.ai_content AS ai_content,

  CASE
    WHEN m.message_id IS NULL THEN FALSE
    ELSE TRUE
  END AS found,

  CASE
    WHEN b.id IS NULL THEN FALSE
    ELSE TRUE
  END AS ai_found,

  b.id AS ai_metadata_id,
  b.message_id AS ai_metadata_message_id,
  b.message_uuid AS ai_metadata_message_uuid,
  b.source_status AS ai_source_status

FROM input_data i
LEFT JOIN message_data m ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN best_metadata b ON TRUE;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id || $json.callback_query?.from?.id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id || $json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id || $json.callback_query?.from?.id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id
),

upsert_state AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.user_state (
    user_id,
    state,
    search_query,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    user_id,
    'waiting_search_query',
    NULL,
    NOW()
  FROM input_data
  ON CONFLICT (user_id)
  DO UPDATE SET
    state = 'waiting_search_query',
    search_query = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING user_id, state
)

SELECT
  input_data.user_id,
  input_data.chat_id,
  upsert_state.state
FROM input_data
JOIN upsert_state ON upsert_state.user_id = input_data.user_id;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{
      (
        (() => { try { return $('Parse Gemini semantic search result').first().json.user_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.user_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Parse search audio query').first().json.user_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.from?.id
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
      )
    }}::BIGINT AS user_id,

    {{
      (
        (() => { try { return $('Parse Gemini semantic search result').first().json.chat_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.chat_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Parse search audio query').first().json.chat_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.chat?.id
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id
      )
    }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,

    '{{ String(
      (() => { try { return $('Parse Gemini semantic search result').first().json.search_query } catch(e) { return null } })()
      || (() => { try { return $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.search_query } catch(e) { return null } })()
      || (() => { try { return $('Parse search audio query').first().json.search_query } catch(e) { return null } })()
      || ''
    ).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS search_query,

    '{{ String(JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json))).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::JSONB AS raw_results
),

delete_previous_sessions AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.search_sessions ss
  USING input_data i
  WHERE ss.user_id = i.user_id
  RETURNING ss.id
),

settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.top_relevant_limit'
      ),
      10
    ) AS top_relevant_limit,

    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.max_results_limit'
      ),
      100
    ) AS max_results_limit
),

valid_results AS (
  SELECT
    elem.value AS result_json,
    elem.ordinality AS source_position
  FROM input_data i
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(i.raw_results) WITH ORDINALITY elem(value, ordinality)
  WHERE
    COALESCE(elem.value->>'no_results', 'false') <> 'true'
    AND COALESCE(elem.value->>'message_id', elem.value->>'id', '') <> ''
),

limited_valid_results AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM valid_results
  WHERE source_position <= (SELECT max_results_limit FROM settings)
),

insert_session AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.search_sessions (
    user_id,
    chat_id,
    search_query,
    total_count
  )
  SELECT
    i.user_id,
    i.chat_id,
    i.search_query,
    COUNT(lvr.result_json)::INTEGER
  FROM input_data i
  LEFT JOIN limited_valid_results lvr ON TRUE
  GROUP BY i.user_id, i.chat_id, i.search_query
  RETURNING id, user_id, chat_id, search_query, total_count
),

prepared_results AS (
  SELECT
    ins.id AS search_session_id,
    ins.user_id,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'message_id', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'id', '')::BIGINT
    ) AS message_id,

    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY
        COALESCE(
          NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'result_position', '')::INTEGER,
          NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'result_number', '')::INTEGER,
          lvr.source_position::INTEGER
        )
    )::INTEGER AS result_position,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'relevance_score', '')::NUMERIC,
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'score', '')::NUMERIC,
      NULL
    ) AS relevance_score,

    lvr.result_json AS result_payload
  FROM insert_session ins
  JOIN limited_valid_results lvr ON TRUE
),

insert_results AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.search_session_results (
    search_session_id,
    message_id,
    result_position,
    relevance_score,
    result_payload
  )
  SELECT
    pr.search_session_id,
    pr.message_id,
    pr.result_position,
    pr.relevance_score,
    pr.result_payload
  FROM prepared_results pr
  JOIN gnote.messages m
    ON m.id = pr.message_id
   AND m.user_id = pr.user_id
   AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
  WHERE pr.message_id IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (search_session_id, message_id) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
)

SELECT
  ins.id AS search_session_id,
  ins.user_id,
  ins.chat_id,
  ins.search_query,
  ins.total_count,
  s.top_relevant_limit,
  s.max_results_limit,
  COUNT(ir.id)::INTEGER AS saved_results_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delete_previous_sessions)::INTEGER AS deleted_previous_search_sessions
FROM insert_session ins
CROSS JOIN settings s
LEFT JOIN insert_results ir ON TRUE
GROUP BY
  ins.id,
  ins.user_id,
  ins.chat_id,
  ins.search_query,
  ins.total_count,
  s.top_relevant_limit,
  s.max_results_limit;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF('{{ String($json.user_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF('{{ String($json.message?.from?.id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF('{{ String($("Telegram Trigger").first().json.message?.from?.id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF('{{ String($("Telegram Trigger").first().json.callback_query?.from?.id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT
    ) AS user_id,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF('{{ String($json.message_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF('{{ String($json.saved_message_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF('{{ String($json.id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::BIGINT
    ) AS message_id,

    NULLIF('{{ String($json.message_uuid || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::UUID AS message_uuid
),

message_ref AS (
  SELECT
    m.id AS message_id,
    m.user_id,
    m.message_uuid
  FROM gnote.messages m
  JOIN input_data i
    ON m.user_id = i.user_id
   AND (
        m.id = i.message_id
        OR m.message_uuid = i.message_uuid
   )
  WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL
  ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
),

updated_metadata AS (
  UPDATE gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  SET
    message_id = mr.message_id,
    pending_message_id = NULL,
    source_status = 'active',
    analysis_status = COALESCE(NULLIF(meta.analysis_status, ''), 'done'),
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM message_ref mr
  WHERE meta.user_id = mr.user_id
    AND (
      meta.message_id = mr.message_id
      OR meta.message_uuid = mr.message_uuid
    )
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') <> 'deleted'
  RETURNING
    meta.id,
    meta.user_id,
    meta.message_id,
    meta.message_uuid,
    meta.source_status
)

SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT user_id FROM message_ref), (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)) AS user_id,
  (SELECT message_id FROM message_ref) AS message_id,
  (SELECT message_uuid FROM message_ref) AS message_uuid,
  COUNT(um.id)::INTEGER AS updated_ai_metadata_rows,
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(um.id) > 0 THEN 'active'
    ELSE 'not_found'
  END AS final_source_status
FROM updated_metadata um
RIGHT JOIN input_data i ON TRUE
GROUP BY i.user_id;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    {{ $json.telegram_message_id || 'NULL' }}::BIGINT AS telegram_message_id,
    '{{ String($json.callback_query_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS callback_query_id
),

pending AS (
  SELECT
    pm.id AS pending_message_id,
    pm.user_id,
    pm.message_uuid,
    pm.message,
    pm.message_type,
    pm.file_name,
    pm.mime_type,
    pm.caption,
    pm.created_at
  FROM gnote.pending_messages pm
  WHERE pm.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
  ORDER BY pm.created_at DESC, pm.id DESC
  LIMIT 1
),

metadata_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    meta.*,
    CASE
      WHEN meta.pending_message_id = p.pending_message_id THEN 1
      WHEN meta.message_uuid = p.message_uuid THEN 2
      ELSE 9
    END AS match_rank
  FROM pending p
  JOIN gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
    ON meta.user_id = p.user_id
   AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'pending') <> 'deleted'
   AND (
        meta.pending_message_id = p.pending_message_id
        OR meta.message_uuid = p.message_uuid
   )
),

best_metadata AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM metadata_candidates
  ORDER BY
    match_rank ASC,
    updated_at DESC NULLS LAST,
    id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT
  i.user_id,
  i.chat_id,
  i.telegram_message_id,
  i.callback_query_id,

  p.pending_message_id,
  p.message_uuid,
  p.message_type,
  p.file_name,
  p.mime_type,
  p.caption,
  p.message,
  p.created_at,

  b.summary AS ai_summary,
  b.category AS ai_category,
  b.language AS ai_language,
  b.keywords AS ai_keywords,
  b.important_details AS ai_important_details,
  b.confidence AS ai_confidence,
  b.ai_content AS ai_content,

  CASE
    WHEN p.pending_message_id IS NULL THEN FALSE
    ELSE TRUE
  END AS pending_found,

  CASE
    WHEN b.id IS NULL THEN FALSE
    ELSE TRUE
  END AS ai_found,

  b.id AS ai_metadata_id,
  b.source_status AS ai_source_status

FROM input_data i
LEFT JOIN pending p ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN best_metadata b ON TRUE;

nodes.name: IF AI search needs file download
IF AI quota allowed - semantic search
Restore AI quota payload - semantic search

parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    'semantic_search'::TEXT AS feature,
    '{{ String(JSON.stringify({
      message_type: $json.message_type || null,
      file_name: $json.file_name || null,
      mime_type: $json.mime_type || null,
      original_search_query: $json.original_search_query || $json.search_query || null
    })).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::JSONB AS metadata,
    '{{ String(JSON.stringify($json)).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::JSONB AS original_payload
),

limit_row AS (
  SELECT
    i.user_id,
    i.chat_id,
    i.feature,
    i.metadata,
    i.original_payload,
    COALESCE(l.hourly_limit, 10) AS hourly_limit,
    COALESCE(l.is_unlimited, FALSE) AS is_unlimited,
    COALESCE(l.plan, 'free') AS plan
  FROM input_data i
  LEFT JOIN gnote.ai_user_limits l
    ON l.user_id = i.user_id
),

usage_now AS (
  SELECT
    lr.user_id,
    lr.chat_id,
    lr.feature,
    lr.metadata,
    lr.original_payload,
    lr.hourly_limit,
    lr.is_unlimited,
    lr.plan,
    COUNT(a.id)::INTEGER AS used_last_hour,
    MIN(a.created_at) AS first_usage_in_window
  FROM limit_row lr
  LEFT JOIN gnote.ai_usage_log a
    ON a.user_id = lr.user_id
   AND a.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
   AND a.status IN ('reserved', 'success')
  GROUP BY
    lr.user_id,
    lr.chat_id,
    lr.feature,
    lr.metadata,
    lr.original_payload,
    lr.hourly_limit,
    lr.is_unlimited,
    lr.plan
),

decision AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    (
      is_unlimited = TRUE
      OR used_last_hour < hourly_limit
    ) AS allowed
  FROM usage_now
),

insert_usage AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.ai_usage_log (
    user_id,
    chat_id,
    feature,
    status,
    metadata
  )
  SELECT
    user_id,
    chat_id,
    feature,
    'reserved',
    metadata
  FROM decision
  WHERE allowed = TRUE
  RETURNING id
)

SELECT
  d.user_id,
  d.chat_id,
  d.feature,
  d.plan,
  d.hourly_limit,
  d.is_unlimited,
  d.used_last_hour,

  CASE
    WHEN d.allowed = TRUE THEN d.used_last_hour + 1
    ELSE d.used_last_hour
  END AS used_after_this_request,

  GREATEST(
    d.hourly_limit -
    CASE
      WHEN d.allowed = TRUE THEN d.used_last_hour + 1
      ELSE d.used_last_hour
    END,
    0
  ) AS remaining_after_this_request,

  d.allowed,

  COALESCE(
    d.first_usage_in_window + INTERVAL '1 hour',
    NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  ) AS reset_at,

  (
    SELECT id
    FROM insert_usage
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS ai_usage_id,

  d.original_payload

FROM decision d;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    'search_audio_transcription'::TEXT AS feature,
    '{{ String(JSON.stringify({
      message_type: $json.message_type || 'voice',
      file_name: $json.file_name || null,
      mime_type: $json.mime_type || null
    })).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::JSONB AS metadata,
    '{{ String(JSON.stringify($json)).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::JSONB AS original_payload
),

limit_row AS (
  SELECT
    i.user_id,
    i.chat_id,
    i.feature,
    i.metadata,
    i.original_payload,
    COALESCE(l.hourly_limit, 10) AS hourly_limit,
    COALESCE(l.is_unlimited, FALSE) AS is_unlimited,
    COALESCE(l.plan, 'free') AS plan
  FROM input_data i
  LEFT JOIN gnote.ai_user_limits l
    ON l.user_id = i.user_id
),

usage_now AS (
  SELECT
    lr.user_id,
    lr.chat_id,
    lr.feature,
    lr.metadata,
    lr.original_payload,
    lr.hourly_limit,
    lr.is_unlimited,
    lr.plan,
    COUNT(a.id)::INTEGER AS used_last_hour,
    MIN(a.created_at) AS first_usage_in_window
  FROM limit_row lr
  LEFT JOIN gnote.ai_usage_log a
    ON a.user_id = lr.user_id
   AND a.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
   AND a.status IN ('reserved', 'success')
  GROUP BY
    lr.user_id,
    lr.chat_id,
    lr.feature,
    lr.metadata,
    lr.original_payload,
    lr.hourly_limit,
    lr.is_unlimited,
    lr.plan
),

decision AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    (
      is_unlimited = TRUE
      OR used_last_hour < hourly_limit
    ) AS allowed
  FROM usage_now
),

insert_usage AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.ai_usage_log (
    user_id,
    chat_id,
    feature,
    status,
    metadata
  )
  SELECT
    user_id,
    chat_id,
    feature,
    'reserved',
    metadata
  FROM decision
  WHERE allowed = TRUE
  RETURNING id
)

SELECT
  d.user_id,
  d.chat_id,
  d.feature,
  d.plan,
  d.hourly_limit,
  d.is_unlimited,
  d.used_last_hour,

  CASE
    WHEN d.allowed = TRUE THEN d.used_last_hour + 1
    ELSE d.used_last_hour
  END AS used_after_this_request,

  GREATEST(
    d.hourly_limit -
    CASE
      WHEN d.allowed = TRUE THEN d.used_last_hour + 1
      ELSE d.used_last_hour
    END,
    0
  ) AS remaining_after_this_request,

  d.allowed,

  COALESCE(
    d.first_usage_in_window + INTERVAL '1 hour',
    NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  ) AS reset_at,

  (
    SELECT id
    FROM insert_usage
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS ai_usage_id,

  d.original_payload

FROM decision d;

nodes.name: IF AI quota allowed - search audio
Restore AI quota payload - semantic search1

parameters.query:
UPDATE gnote.user_state
SET
  state = 'idle',
  search_query = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = {{ 
  (
    $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.user_id
    || $('switch messages').first().json.message?.from?.id
    || $('switch messages').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
    || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.from?.id
    || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
  )
}}::BIGINT
RETURNING user_id, state;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{
      (
        (() => { try { return $('Parse Gemini semantic search result').first().json.user_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.user_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Parse search audio query').first().json.user_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.from?.id
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
      )
    }}::BIGINT AS user_id,

    {{
      (
        (() => { try { return $('Parse Gemini semantic search result').first().json.chat_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.chat_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Parse search audio query').first().json.chat_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.chat?.id
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id
      )
    }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,

    '{{ String(
      (() => { try { return $('Parse Gemini semantic search result').first().json.search_query } catch(e) { return null } })()
      || (() => { try { return $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.search_query } catch(e) { return null } })()
      || (() => { try { return $('Parse search audio query').first().json.search_query } catch(e) { return null } })()
      || ''
    ).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS search_query,

    '{{ String(JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json))).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::JSONB AS raw_results
),

delete_previous_sessions AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.search_sessions ss
  USING input_data i
  WHERE ss.user_id = i.user_id
  RETURNING ss.id
),

settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.top_relevant_limit'
      ),
      10
    ) AS top_relevant_limit,

    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.max_results_limit'
      ),
      100
    ) AS max_results_limit
),

valid_results AS (
  SELECT
    elem.value AS result_json,
    elem.ordinality AS source_position
  FROM input_data i
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(i.raw_results) WITH ORDINALITY elem(value, ordinality)
  WHERE
    COALESCE(elem.value->>'no_results', 'false') <> 'true'
    AND COALESCE(elem.value->>'message_id', elem.value->>'id', '') <> ''
),

limited_valid_results AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM valid_results
  WHERE source_position <= (SELECT max_results_limit FROM settings)
),

insert_session AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.search_sessions (
    user_id,
    chat_id,
    search_query,
    total_count
  )
  SELECT
    i.user_id,
    i.chat_id,
    i.search_query,
    COUNT(lvr.result_json)::INTEGER
  FROM input_data i
  LEFT JOIN limited_valid_results lvr ON TRUE
  GROUP BY i.user_id, i.chat_id, i.search_query
  RETURNING id, user_id, chat_id, search_query, total_count
),

prepared_results AS (
  SELECT
    ins.id AS search_session_id,
    ins.user_id,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'message_id', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'id', '')::BIGINT
    ) AS message_id,

    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY
        COALESCE(
          NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'result_position', '')::INTEGER,
          NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'result_number', '')::INTEGER,
          lvr.source_position::INTEGER
        )
    )::INTEGER AS result_position,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'relevance_score', '')::NUMERIC,
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'score', '')::NUMERIC,
      NULL
    ) AS relevance_score,

    lvr.result_json AS result_payload
  FROM insert_session ins
  JOIN limited_valid_results lvr ON TRUE
),

insert_results AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.search_session_results (
    search_session_id,
    message_id,
    result_position,
    relevance_score,
    result_payload
  )
  SELECT
    pr.search_session_id,
    pr.message_id,
    pr.result_position,
    pr.relevance_score,
    pr.result_payload
  FROM prepared_results pr
  JOIN gnote.messages m
    ON m.id = pr.message_id
   AND m.user_id = pr.user_id
   AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
  WHERE pr.message_id IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (search_session_id, message_id) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
)

SELECT
  ins.id AS search_session_id,
  ins.user_id,
  ins.chat_id,
  ins.search_query,
  ins.total_count,
  s.top_relevant_limit,
  s.max_results_limit,
  COUNT(ir.id)::INTEGER AS saved_results_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delete_previous_sessions)::INTEGER AS deleted_previous_search_sessions
FROM insert_session ins
CROSS JOIN settings s
LEFT JOIN insert_results ir ON TRUE
GROUP BY
  ins.id,
  ins.user_id,
  ins.chat_id,
  ins.search_query,
  ins.total_count,
  s.top_relevant_limit,
  s.max_results_limit;

WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{
      (
        (() => { try { return $('Parse Gemini semantic search result').first().json.user_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.user_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Parse search audio query').first().json.user_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.from?.id
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
      )
    }}::BIGINT AS user_id,

    {{
      (
        (() => { try { return $('Parse Gemini semantic search result').first().json.chat_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.chat_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || (() => { try { return $('Parse search audio query').first().json.chat_id } catch(e) { return null } })()
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.chat?.id
        || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.message?.chat?.id
      )
    }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,

    '{{ String(
      (() => { try { return $('Parse Gemini semantic search result').first().json.search_query } catch(e) { return null } })()
      || (() => { try { return $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.search_query } catch(e) { return null } })()
      || (() => { try { return $('Parse search audio query').first().json.search_query } catch(e) { return null } })()
      || ''
    ).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS search_query,

    '{{ String(JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json))).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::JSONB AS raw_results
),

delete_previous_sessions AS (
  DELETE FROM gnote.search_sessions ss
  USING input_data i
  WHERE ss.user_id = i.user_id
  RETURNING ss.id
),

settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.top_relevant_limit'
      ),
      10
    ) AS top_relevant_limit,

    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.max_results_limit'
      ),
      100
    ) AS max_results_limit
),

valid_results AS (
  SELECT
    elem.value AS result_json,
    elem.ordinality AS source_position
  FROM input_data i
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(i.raw_results) WITH ORDINALITY elem(value, ordinality)
  WHERE
    COALESCE(elem.value->>'no_results', 'false') <> 'true'
    AND COALESCE(elem.value->>'message_id', elem.value->>'id', '') <> ''
),

limited_valid_results AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM valid_results
  WHERE source_position <= (SELECT max_results_limit FROM settings)
),

insert_session AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.search_sessions (
    user_id,
    chat_id,
    search_query,
    total_count
  )
  SELECT
    i.user_id,
    i.chat_id,
    i.search_query,
    COUNT(lvr.result_json)::INTEGER
  FROM input_data i
  LEFT JOIN limited_valid_results lvr ON TRUE
  GROUP BY i.user_id, i.chat_id, i.search_query
  RETURNING id, user_id, chat_id, search_query, total_count
),

prepared_results AS (
  SELECT
    ins.id AS search_session_id,
    ins.user_id,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'message_id', '')::BIGINT,
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'id', '')::BIGINT
    ) AS message_id,

    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY
        COALESCE(
          NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'result_position', '')::INTEGER,
          NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'result_number', '')::INTEGER,
          lvr.source_position::INTEGER
        )
    )::INTEGER AS result_position,

    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'relevance_score', '')::NUMERIC,
      NULLIF(lvr.result_json->>'score', '')::NUMERIC,
      NULL
    ) AS relevance_score,

    lvr.result_json AS result_payload
  FROM insert_session ins
  JOIN limited_valid_results lvr ON TRUE
),

insert_results AS (
  INSERT INTO gnote.search_session_results (
    search_session_id,
    message_id,
    result_position,
    relevance_score,
    result_payload
  )
  SELECT
    pr.search_session_id,
    pr.message_id,
    pr.result_position,
    pr.relevance_score,
    pr.result_payload
  FROM prepared_results pr
  JOIN gnote.messages m
    ON m.id = pr.message_id
   AND m.user_id = pr.user_id
   AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
  WHERE pr.message_id IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (search_session_id, message_id) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
)

SELECT
  ins.id AS search_session_id,
  ins.user_id,
  ins.chat_id,
  ins.search_query,
  ins.total_count,
  s.top_relevant_limit,
  s.max_results_limit,
  COUNT(ir.id)::INTEGER AS saved_results_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delete_previous_sessions)::INTEGER AS deleted_previous_search_sessions
FROM insert_session ins
CROSS JOIN settings s
LEFT JOIN insert_results ir ON TRUE
GROUP BY
  ins.id,
  ins.user_id,
  ins.chat_id,
  ins.search_query,
  ins.total_count,
  s.top_relevant_limit,
  s.max_results_limit;

UPDATE gnote.user_state
SET
  state = 'idle',
  search_query = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = {{ 
  (
    $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.user_id
    || $('switch messages').first().json.message?.from?.id
    || $('switch messages').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
    || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.from?.id
    || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
  )
}}::BIGINT
RETURNING user_id, state;

UPDATE gnote.user_state
SET
  state = 'idle',
  search_query = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = {{ 
  (
    $('Prepare search query payload').first().json.user_id
    || $('switch messages').first().json.message?.from?.id
    || $('switch messages').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
    || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.message?.from?.id
    || $('Telegram Trigger').first().json.callback_query?.from?.id
  )
}}::BIGINT
RETURNING user_id, state;

-- 1. Create a baseline configuration matrix for all expected Telegram message types
WITH expected_types AS (
  SELECT unnest(ARRAY[
    'text', 'photo', 'document', 'voice', 
    'audio', 'video', 'video_note', 'location'
  ]) AS message_type
),

-- 2. Fetch the overall cumulative message metric from the global users registry row
user_profile AS (
  SELECT 
    id AS user_id,
    COALESCE(all_messages, 0) AS cumulative_total,
    first_visit
  FROM gnote.users
  WHERE id = {{ $json.message.from.id }}::BIGINT
),

-- 3. Normalize messages handling image extensions uploaded as uncompressed documents
normalized_messages AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    user_id,
    deleted_at,
    file_name,
    CASE 
      -- If it's a document but has an image extension, classify it as a photo for stats
      WHEN message_type = 'document' AND LOWER(RIGHT(file_name, 4)) IN ('jpeg', '.jpg', '.png', 'webp', '.gif') THEN 'photo'
      ELSE message_type
    END AS adjusted_message_type
  FROM gnote.messages
  WHERE user_id = {{ $json.message.from.id }}::BIGINT
    AND deleted_at IS NULL
),

-- 4. Calculate real-time database totals grouped by the adjusted message types
real_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    adjusted_message_type AS message_type,
    COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS count
  FROM normalized_messages
  GROUP BY adjusted_message_type
),

-- 5. Merge baseline matrix with adjusted totals to avoid missing types in n8n execution
aggregated_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    et.message_type,
    COALESCE(rc.count, 0) AS total_count
  FROM expected_types et
  LEFT JOIN real_counts rc ON rc.message_type = et.message_type
),

-- 6. Isolate specific file path extensions strictly for real non-image documents
document_extensions AS (
  SELECT 
    LOWER(RIGHT(file_name, 4)) AS ext,
    COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS count
  FROM normalized_messages
  WHERE adjusted_message_type = 'document'
    AND file_name IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY LOWER(RIGHT(file_name, 4))
)

-- 7. Combine all metric tables into a single structural JSON output payload for n8n
SELECT 
  {{ $json.message.chat.id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT cumulative_total FROM user_profile), 0)::INTEGER AS profile_total_counter,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM gnote.messages WHERE user_id = {{ $json.message.from.id }}::BIGINT AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS real_total,
  (SELECT first_visit FROM user_profile) AS member_since,
  
  -- Extract specific adjusted message type totals mapped dynamically
  MAX(CASE WHEN message_type = 'text' THEN total_count ELSE 0 END) AS total_texts,
  MAX(CASE WHEN message_type = 'photo' THEN total_count ELSE 0 END) AS total_photos,
  MAX(CASE WHEN message_type = 'document' THEN total_count ELSE 0 END) AS total_documents,
  MAX(CASE WHEN message_type = 'voice' THEN total_count ELSE 0 END) AS total_voices,
  MAX(CASE WHEN message_type = 'audio' THEN total_count ELSE 0 END) AS total_audios,
  MAX(CASE WHEN message_type = 'video' THEN total_count ELSE 0 END) AS total_videos,
  MAX(CASE WHEN message_type = 'video_note' THEN total_count ELSE 0 END) AS total_video_notes,
  MAX(CASE WHEN message_type = 'location' THEN total_count ELSE 0 END) AS total_locations,
  
  -- Extract specialized sub-type totals for target document categories
  COALESCE((SELECT SUM(count)::INTEGER FROM document_extensions WHERE ext IN ('.pdf', 'pdf')), 0) AS docs_pdf,
  COALESCE((SELECT SUM(count)::INTEGER FROM document_extensions WHERE ext IN ('.doc', 'docx', 'rtf', 'txt', '.txt')), 0) AS docs_text_files,
  COALESCE((SELECT SUM(count)::INTEGER FROM document_extensions WHERE ext IN ('.xls', 'xlsx', '.csv', 'csv')), 0) AS docs_spreadsheets
FROM aggregated_stats;
